title: ores=more
description:
this mod adds 4 new ores that are all better than diamond
with custom weaponry that give custom effects
body:
The Ores=More mod for Minecraft introduces four unique ores, each with distinct armor sets and a special tool. Score inflicts weakness upon enemies, Viridinium causes poison effects, Mernor grants the player incredible speed, and Light Stone not only inflicts levitation but also bestows the Everlight effect, enhancing the player's strength to extraordinary levels. This mod offers players exciting new gameplay mechanics and strategies through its inventive ore-based enhancements.


Score, a tier 1 ore in the mod, is notable for its distinctive purple hue and its ability to inflict weakness on enemies. When crafted into armor, it provides impressive abilities, enhancing the player's survivability and combat effectiveness, making it a valuable resource late in the game.


In the mod Viridinium, the green ore not only serves as a unique resource that poisons enemies upon contact but also enhances gameplay by granting players exceptional parkour abilities when fully equipped with the corresponding armor. This combination allows for a dynamic and tactical approach to combat and exploration, with players able to swiftly navigate the environment while strategically incapacitating foes.


Mernor, recognized for its striking orange color, is a tier 3 ore in the mod that notably enhances the player's speed while simultaneously inflicting slowness on opponents. When crafted into armor, it bestows impressive speed, allowing players to execute faster movements and navigate terrain with remarkable speed, making it a sought-after resource for enhancing mobility in gameplay.


Finally, Light Stone is a tier 4 ore characterized by its stunning blue geode appearance, which inflicts levitation on enemies upon contact. When crafted into armor, it provides the user with incredible strength, significantly amplifying their combat capabilities and making it a highly coveted resource for players looking to dominate their opponents in battle.


In The Latest versions

In the mod, "Seaum" is a rare turquoise material found exclusively in shipwrecks, known for its ability to inflict drowning damage on opponents until they succumb. When the player dons the full Seaum armor set, they gain enhanced water powers, allowing them to breathe underwater effortlessly, and swim at incredible speeds, making them a formidable force in oceanic battles.

also if you chose the other latest version there is a 3d ligth stone hammer.
